chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Reasons for the Obligation of Zakat

text: 1575 - وَ رَوَى مُبَارَكٌ اَلْعَقَرْقُوفِيُّ عَنْ أَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ مُوسَى بْنِ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: «إِنَّمَا وُضِعَتِ اَلزَّكَاةُ قُوتاً لِلْفُقَرَاءِ وَ تَوْفِيراً لِأَمْوَالِهِمْ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1575 - Mubarak Al-Aqrqoufi narrated from Abu Al-Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) who said:
"Zakat was established as sustenance for the poor and a means of increasing their wealth."
